name: Expansion Book
description: In-game book menu with server info, rules, crafting recipes, party management, and territory management tabs.
overview:
Expansion Book provides an in-game menu (opened with B by default) that serves as a central hub for server information, rules, party management, territory management, and player status.

## Available Tabs

- **Status Tab** — Character info including health, hunger, thirst values
- **Party Tab** — Create and manage parties, invite players (uses PartySettings.json)
- **Territory Tab** — Manage territories, invite/kick members (uses TerritorySettings.json)
- **Server Info Tab** — Custom server description, buttons linking to Discord/forums/websites
- **Server Rules Tab** — Categorized server rules displayed in-game
- **Crafting Tab** — Reference crafting recipes with icons

Each tab can be individually enabled or disabled through BookSettings.json.
installation: Ensure Expansion Core is installed and loaded.
Add @ExpansionBook to your -mod= parameter after Core.
Start the server to generate BookSettings.json.
Configure which tabs are enabled and customize server info and rules.
Restart the server for changes to take effect.

troubleshooting.problem: Book not opening with B key
troubleshooting.solution: Ensure EnableBookMenu is set to 1 and the mod is loaded correctly.
Check EnablePartyTab is set to 1. The Groups mod must also be installed for full party functionality.
Verify RuleCategories array is properly formatted with CategoryName and Rules arrays.

useCases.title: Server Info Hub
useCases.description: Use the book as a central information hub with your server's rules, Discord link, and donation page.

useCases.title: Minimal UI
useCases.description: Disable unnecessary tabs like crafting and territory for a streamlined player experience.

useCases.title: Rule Enforcement
useCases.description: Display categorized server rules (General, PvP, Base Building, etc.) that players can reference in-game.

quickSettings.name: EnableStatusTab
quickSettings.description: Show the player status/profile tab with health, hunger, and thirst info.

quickSettings.name: EnablePartyTab
quickSettings.description: Show the party management tab. Disabling prevents players from creating parties.

quickSettings.name: EnableServerInfoTab
quickSettings.description: Show the server info page with description and redirect buttons.

quickSettings.name: EnableServerRulesTab
quickSettings.description: Show the server rules tab with categorized rules.

quickSettings.name: EnableTerritoryTab
quickSettings.description: Show the territory management tab. Disabling prevents territory member management.

quickSettings.name: EnableBookMenu
quickSettings.description: Master toggle for the entire book. Set to 0 to completely disable the B-key menu.

quickSettings.name: CreateBookmarks
quickSettings.description: Display bookmark tabs at the top of the book for quick navigation between categories.

useCases.title: Server Info Hub
useCases.description: Use the book as a central information hub with your server's rules, Discord link, and donation page.

useCases.title: Minimal UI
useCases.description: Disable unnecessary tabs like crafting and territory for a streamlined player experience.
